seoTitle: Create Clickable Audio in a Canva Presentation
metaDescription: Learn how to add clickable audio to a Canva presentation so viewers can interact with narration, music, or sound clips on demand.
intro: Adding clickable audio to a presentation lets viewers interact with narration or sound clips at their own pace, making your slides more engaging. This guide covers how to add and edit audio inside Canva.

steps.heading: Accessing audio features in Canva
steps.body: Open your presentation and locate the audio upload or library option within Canva's editor.

steps.heading: Adding audio clips to your presentation
steps.body: Insert your chosen audio file or voiceover onto the relevant slide so it's ready to be played.

steps.heading: Editing audio settings for clarity
steps.body: Trim, adjust volume, or set playback options so the audio integrates smoothly with your slide content.

steps.heading: Final tips for effective presentations
steps.body: Keep audio clips concise and clearly linked to their corresponding slide to avoid confusing your audience.

faq.question: Can viewers control when the audio plays?
faq.answer: Yes, clickable audio allows viewers to start playback on their own instead of it playing automatically.

faq.question: What audio formats does Canva support?
faq.answer: Canva generally supports common audio formats for upload, making it easy to add voiceovers or music tracks.

faq.question: Is this feature useful for training materials?
faq.answer: Yes, clickable audio is especially useful for narrated training slides or interactive educational content.

faq.question: Can I remove audio after adding it?
faq.answer: Yes, you can delete or replace an audio clip on any slide at any time during editing.
